hero.title: Cultivating the Infinite Potential of Mycelium
hero.subtitle: We upcycle Tunisian agricultural co-products—like olive husks and wheat grains—into premium mycelium spawn and compostable bio-materials. Empowering regional growers and driving the circular economy.

about.title: Pioneering Organic Biotech in North Africa
about.subtitle: Born in the fertile regions of Tunisia, we bridge local agricultural heritage with state-of-the-art biological science.
about.story: Biotech Agro was founded by a team of bioprocess engineers and mycologists from Tunis and Beja. Recognizing the abundance of agricultural co-products like olive mill waste (Zabara) and crop straws, we set out to build a circular mycelium startup. In our cleanroom laboratory, we inoculate high-grade mother cultures onto sterile Tunisian grains, creating highly viable grain spawn for immediate cultivation. Additionally, we are pioneering organic bio-composites, offering plastic-free, insulating packaging blocks grown 100% naturally.
about.mission: To scale circular mushroom cultivation across Tunisia, provide premium, sterile grain spawn of local parent species, and engineer bio-materials that completely substitute single-use plastics.
about.vision: To establish Tunisia as a hub for mycelium technology in Africa, turning raw agricultural waste into valuable bio-materials through low-energy biological processes.
about.teamFocus: Our team of Tunisian scientists and operators strictly monitor every batch under HEPA-14 sterile air systems, performing rigorous inoculation tests to guarantee clean, zero-contamination grain spawn.

features.title: 100% Native Substrates
features.description: We utilize premium Tunisian barley, wheat grains, and upcycled regional olive wood sawdust for our mycelial structures.

features.title: Sterile Cleanroom Bio-Lab
features.description: All our grain spawn batches are inoculated inside HEPA-14 filtered environments, warranting a zero-contamination rate.

features.title: Circular Bio-pack Innovation
features.description: Our custom packaging blocks are grown by biological binding, fully decomposing into organic soil nutrients in 45 days.

features.title: Empowering Regional Farmers
features.description: We support growers in Béja, Jendouba, and Bizerte with optimized climate templates and inoculation guidelines.

contactDetails.address: Zone Industrielle Charguia II, Tunis 2035, Tunisia

products.name: Oyster Spawn (Pleurote) on Organic Wheat
products.description: Our workhorse commercial strain. Optimized for Tunisian agricultural side-streams like straw and olive pulp. Rapid colonization, robust heavy clusters, and excellent cold-to-moderate temperature tolerance.

products.name: Grey Shiitake Grain Spawn
products.description: Certified high-yielding Japanese origin clone perfectly adapted to Tunisian oak and eucalyptus wood sawdust. Produces highly aromatic, firm, premium-grade Shiitake mushrooms.

products.name: MycoPack Custom Bioshield
products.description: Completely organic packaging material grown using Pleurotus vegetative mycelium on agricultural chaff by-products. Non-toxic, fire-resistant, water-resistant, shock-absorbing design. Replaces styrofoam.

products.name: Mother Culture Agar Plate
products.description: A high-purity, fully colonized Malt Extract Agar (MEA) petri dish under sterile Parafilm sealing. Isolated to provide highly robust mycelial sectors, ready for liquid culture or master grain transfers.
specifications: Agar Medium: 2% Malt Extract with Peptone
Sterility Control: Autoclaved at 121°C for 25 mins

products.name: Champignon de Paris Spawn
products.description: Premium industrial grade white button mushroom spawn (Champignon de Paris). Reconditioned for maximum biological yield on composted straw manure side-products, delivering high harvest density and firm gourmet texture.
specifications: Substrate Carrier: Local Premium Grain Mix

services.name: Industrial Cultivation Farm Design
services.description: Professional engineering consulting for climate setups, automated misting systems, ventilation ratios, and floor maps matching the Mediterranean arid-to-subhumid climate.
benefits: CFD Airflow Heat Modeling for growing tunnels
Humidifier sizing for dry Tunisian summer periods
Equipment checklist & local supplier sourcing list

services.name: Mycology Labs & Cleanroom Setup
services.description: Technical support for planning, building, and certifying standard low-budget or professional-grade tissue culture rooms, laminar flow hoods, and grain sterilization rigs.
benefits: Laminar flow hood HEPA air pressure rating checks
Quality feedback loop setup for batch tracings

messages.subject: Bulk Grain Spawn Inquiry for Jendouba Farm
messages.message: Asslema, I am looking to establish a oyster mushroom growing project in Jendouba. We have lots of wheat straw ready after harvest. I would like to query about ordering 150 kg of Pleurotus ostreatus Grain Spawn. Please advise if we can get a bulk discount. Bravo for this amazing startup!

messages.subject: Eco-packaging collaboration test
messages.message: Hello, we are evaluating alternative sustainable packings for glass bottles of olive oil in Sfax. We are highly fascinated by your Mycelium custom bioshields. Can we exchange specifications and schedule a lab demonstration visit? Best regards, Sonia.
